description: You are a certified vehicle inspector performing a pre-purchase inspection for a 2016 Fiat Ducato 2.3 Multijet II 130HP (details in the work order on the Desktop). Using Multiecuscan in simulation mode, conduct an electronic inspection of the Engine ECU, Transmission/Gearbox ECU, ABS/Braking System, Body Computer (BSI), and Airbag/SRS System. Document ECU identification (software and hardware versions), all Diagnostic Trouble Codes (DTCs) with descriptions, and operational parameters including fuel pressure, injection quantity, DPF status, wheel speed sensor data, and CAN communication status. Classify all identified faults as CRITICAL, MAJOR, MINOR, or CLEARED. Produce a formal pre-purchase inspection certificate at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\MultiecuscanTasks\prepurchase_certificate.txt. The certificate must include vehicle details, individual sections for each system, an overall risk score (0-100), and a final purchase verdict (RECOMMENDED, CONDITIONAL RECOMMENDED, or NOT RECOMMENDED) with justification.
natural_language: Perform a complete 5-system electronic pre-purchase inspection on a Fiat Ducato van using Multiecuscan. Scan Engine, Transmission, ABS, Body Computer, and Airbag/SRS systems. Classify all DTCs as critical/major/minor, generate an overall risk score, and produce a formal pre-purchase certificate with a buy/no-buy recommendation.
